public_wording: TheoryGate checks whether a proposed physics theory is mathematically structured, dimensionally coherent, falsifiable, and prediction-bearing. It does not prove new physics or replace simulation, experiment, or peer review.

result.mode: TheoryGate pipeline (10 conservative statuses, evidence packs)
result.public_wording: TheoryGate checks whether a proposed physics theory is mathematically structured, dimensionally coherent, falsifiable, and prediction-bearing. It does not prove new physics or replace simulation, experiment, or peer review.

limitations: TheoryGate is a structural check; it does not prove new physics.
Known-law checklist is declarative; TheoryGate does not re-derive physics.
Final validation requires simulation, experiment, or peer review.
results.next_required_validation: provide theory name and raw claim
